source_pr.title: statstest: make test faster
source_pr.body:

2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #44940

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: `statstest` Bazel go_test is marked `flaky=True` and runs with `race="on"` (statistics/handle/handletest/statstest/BUILD.bazel)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily optimizes the stats test runtime by splitting a single test into two separate tests (so they can shard better) and adjusting Bazel shard_count. While this may mitigate flakiness caused by slow/overloaded CI runs, the catalog entry does not contain a concrete flaky failure signature or root-cause analysis beyond the suite being marked flaky. To avoid guessing, classify as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Split a slow test into two to speed up/shard better and adjust shard_count; mitigation without a captured flaky signature.
analysis:
PR title: statstest: make test faster
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/45772
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (2): statistics/handle/handletest/statstest/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/statstest/stats_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
